diagrams.title: Complexity Growth Comparison
diagrams.description: Graph showing growth rates of different complexity classes as n increases
elements: O(log n) - very slow upward curve
O(n log n) - steeper than linear
diagrams.purpose: Visualize and compare how different complexity classes scale with input size, helping choose efficient algorithms for large inputs

diagrams.title: Asymptotic Bounds Illustration
diagrams.description: Visual representation of Big O, Big Omega, and Big Theta relationships between functions
elements: Shows f(n) curve bounded between c₁g(n) and c₂g(n) for Θ
Shows f(n) below c×g(n) for O (upper bound)
Shows f(n) above c×g(n) for Ω (lower bound)
diagrams.purpose: Understand the mathematical relationships between functions in asymptotic notation
